context: Tests whether the agent proceeds to check for body-only documentation drift even when scripts/get_diff.sh exits with code 1 (no signature changes found). The function signature is unchanged so the script reports nothing — but the body changed and the docstring is now stale (says 'two conditions' when there are now four).

checklist.name: Stale docstring updated
checklist.description: src/validator.py docstring no longer says 'two conditions' OR the doc-sync-report.md shows it was updated to reflect the four validation conditions

checklist.name: Body-only drift detected
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains an entry for validate_password indicating a docstring update — the agent did NOT stop after seeing no contract changes

checklist.name: Not stopped at script exit
checklist.description: The report does NOT say 'No contract changes detected' as a final conclusion that stops processing — it proceeds to detect the body-only drift

checklist.name: Unified report format
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains '## Doc Sync Report' as a top-level heading
